description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and white horizontal stripes. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel across the entire top face, giving it a visually striking, almost industrial or urban look. The sides of the block are solid black, contrasting sharply with the patterned top. The block appears to be made of a dense, heavy material, likely concrete or stone, with a slightly rough and weathered texture visible on the white stripes. The overall form is simple and geometric, with clean, straight edges and a uniform thickness. This type of block could serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, such as a traffic divider or a decorative boundary.
description: A rectangular stone block with a striped black and white top surface and solid black sides, featuring a rough, weathered texture. The design is bold and geometric, suitable for use as an urban barrier or obstacle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal black and white stripes across the top surface and the solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical orientation of the stripes and the solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing vertical stripes and the solid black side face.
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or placed on a level surface
attribute_weathering_pattern: Slight surface discoloration and roughness, indicating some exposure to the elements but no major erosion or chipping.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
